expectations.text: hook_theme() returns array with 'variables' key listing all template variables
expectations.evidence: featured_resources.module: hook_theme() returns ['featured_resources_list' => ['variables' => ['items' => [], 'heading' => NULL]]]. Both items and heading declared with defaults.

expectations.text: Template filename uses hyphens (e.g., featured-resources-list.html.twig), NOT underscores
expectations.evidence: templates/featured-resources-list.html.twig exists with hyphenated name, matching Drupal convention of underscore-to-hyphen for theme hook to template mapping.

expectations.text: Render array uses #theme key referencing the hook_theme entry
expectations.evidence: FeaturedResourcesBlock.php build() returns ['#theme' => 'featured_resources_list', '#items' => $items, '#heading' => ...] -- correctly references the hook_theme entry.
FeaturedResourcesBlock.php build() includes '#attached' => ['library' => ['featured_resources/featured_resources']] in the render array.

expectations.text: featured_resources.libraries.yml defines the library with CSS path
expectations.evidence: featured_resources.libraries.yml defines 'featured_resources' library with css/component/css/featured_resources.css path.

expectations.text: Does NOT build raw HTML strings (no Markup::create with HTML tags in build methods)
expectations.evidence: No Markup::create or raw HTML string construction in any file. All rendering done through #theme render array and Twig template.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en featured_resources returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Module confirmed enabled via ddev drush pm:list --status=enabled showing (featured_resources).

expectations.text: E2E: Template renders -- the module's themed output can be rendered without PHP errors
expectations.evidence: Module enabled without errors. Theme hook registered in theme registry confirmed via drush php-eval checking theme.registry service. Block uses D11 #[Block] attribute.

claims.claim: Uses D11 PHP attribute #[Block] instead of @Block annotation
claims.evidence: FeaturedResourcesBlock.php uses #[Block(id: 'featured_resources_block', admin_label: new TranslatableMarkup('Featured Resources'), category: new TranslatableMarkup('Custom'))]

claims.claim: template_preprocess function adds CSS class via variables

eval_feedback.overall: All 8 expectations pass. The with-skill output demonstrates D11 attribute syntax and proper preprocess function usage, both guided by the skill.
